title: 6723 - Product Engineer
description:
Product Engineer

5 days, 8.30am- 6pm

Salary: $3,000 - $4,200

Location: (Jurong East)

Responsibilities:

  • Mechanical Design & Development Skill: Translate product and system requirements into manufacturable mechanical designs, considering performance, safety, and production constraints.
  • Product Development: Build and test prototypes, analyse test results, and iterate designs to improve reliability, performance, and manufacturability throughout product lifecycle.
  • Machinery Arrangement & Layout Planning: Develop machinery arrangement and layout plans to optimize space utilization, accessibility, safety, and maintenance.
  • Conduct research to understand user needs, market trends, and product requirements.
  • Create detailed design concepts and prototypes using CAD software and Solidworks modelling software.
  • Develop detailed mechanical designs, including drawings, models, BOMs, and specifications.
  • Collaborate with engineers to ensure designs meet technical requirements and performance standards.
  • Work closely with cross-functional teams, including industrial designers, electrical engineers, and manufacturing teams, to bring products from concept to production.
  • Participate in design reviews, provide feedback, and make necessary adjustments based on input from stakeholders.
  • Communicate effectively with suppliers and vendors to ensure the feasibility and cost-effectiveness of designs.
  • Create and maintain detailed documentation of designs, including specifications, calculations, and revisions.
  • Any other ad-hoc duties as assigned.

Requirements:

  • Minimum Diploma in Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Design, or a related field.
  • At least 2 years of experience in mechanical product design.
  • Proficiency in CAD software (e.g., SolidWorks, AutoCAD).
  • Strong understanding of mechanical principles, materials, and manufacturing processes.



📲Interested candidates, please WhatsApp your resume to: +65 9642 0989 (Han) 📧 Or email your resume to: supreme.cc.han@gmail.com

👤Chaw Chiaw Han | R22106723🏢 The Supreme HR Advisory Pte Ltd | EA 14C7279
